channel.title: PNallDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from PNallDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Judge Reluctantly Drops Proud Boys Jan. 6 Case
item.description: A federal judge dismissed the criminal case against four Proud Boys members convicted for their roles in the Jan. 6 Capitol riot.

item.title: Iran's Alleged Plot to Kill Trump Thwarted by Israeli Intel
GOP Senator Warns of 'Hammer-and-Sickle' Politics in Democrats' 2028 Primary
item.description: Sen. Eric Schmitt says the progressive wave unseating Democratic incumbents in New York and Michigan will shape the party's 2028 presidential primary.

item.title: USDA: California and 40 Other States Have Over $10B in SNAP Waste
